stellarprism.join.message: Hello %1$s, it seems like you have Stellar Prism installed if you have any questions or need the wiki please join the discord

stellarprism.skill.opal.description: When the §fBlinding Light§r fills your heart to inspire others

stellarprism.skill.mode.opal.create: Your Prosperity in this moment has been saved
stellarprism.skill.mode.opal.death: You have been reverted to Prosperity from the past to escape death

Your Damage is being infused with §5Poison

stellarprism.skill.aquamarine.descriptio: Your Heart is to help others and as gentle as a §bRiver

stellarprism.ep.acquire_fallen.aqua: %s EP has been acquired from the deceased %s.
stellar.skill.mode.aquamarine.check_poin: The number of Aquamarine Points with %s: %s
stellarprism.skill.citrine.description: §eMusic§r is engraved in your heart that leads to endless possibilities
stellarprism.skill.mode.citrine.active: Your Damage is being converted to §eSound
stellarprism.skill.topaz.description: An Unbreakable Heart that is stronger as §6Diamonds§r grants immense strength
stellarprism.skill.mode.topaz.active: Your Damage is being converted to §6Earth
stellarprism.skill.bright_will.descripti: §fWhen one has strived to obtain great power for others they will be seen in a great blinding light
stellarprism.skill.dark_will.description: §0When One has lost their self to obtain power at all cost they may be looked down upon
stellarprism.skill.reality_surge.descrip: You who have inherited the vessal to control §4Reality §rshall bend it to your very will!
stellarprsim.skill.steal.fail: The Foes §6Will §ris far greater than your own
stellarprism.skill.powerassention.descri: Harness the vessel of §bpower§r and awaken something beyond your limits
stellarprism.skill.time_spiral.descripti: The essence of §1time§r flows within you like a spiral making you its new vessel
stellarprism.skill.hopes_embrace.descrip: Embrace the new vessel of §6Hope§r letting it push you forward to overcome the greatest odds
stellarprism.skill.spatial_flow.descript: Harness the flow of §dspace§r as you become its new vessel
stellarprism.skill.worlds_catalyst.descr: Dominate the §aworlds§r themselves creation has no limit upon what you can achieve as the catalyst of this vessel
stellarprism.skill.worlds_catalyst.acqui: §aThe worlds bend to your will... thus granting §r%s§a for a little while...
stellarprism.skill.worlds_catalyst.keep: §aThe worlds fall to your will... thus presenting §r%s§a for you to keep...
stellarprism.skill.worlds_catalyst.lose: §aThe worlds reject your will... thus taking §r%s§a from you...
stellarprism.skill.heart_ultimate_upgrad: %1$s §fwas §4sacrificed §fto evolve and Empower %2$s into the ability %3$s.
stellarprism.skill.ultimate_upgrade: Your Heart %1$s §fwas Empowered §fto evolve into the ability %2$s.
stellarprism.skill.upgrade.null: The requirements for this evolution are not met
stellarprism.skill.star_upgrade: %1$s§f, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s, %5$s, and %6$s were §4sacrificed §fto evolve into the ability %7$s.
stellarprism.skill.copy.success: §6Your §e§lWill§r§6 has forged a new power for you to wield§l %s §r§6is now yours.
stellarprism.skill.copy.fail: §6Your §e§lWill§r§6 is not great enough to forge a new power.
stellarprism.skill.star_of_willpower.des: Through Combining the 6 §4s§6h§ba§1t§dt§4e§6r§be§1d§r powers you now shall carry the vessel of a divine §e§lWillPower
stellarprism.skill.tama.description: One ninth of The Primordial Kitsune said to be the very ambitious, tricky, and dangerous. Making a deal with her is essentially selling you entire life for her bidding
stellarprism.skill.tama.mastery: You do not have enough control over Tama to achieve this form
stellarprism.skill.skill_bestowal.descri: A seemingly weak skill with the sole ability to pass itself on..
stellarprism.skill.power_accumulation.de: Stockpile power as you grow and release it for a empowered strike
stellarprism.skill.ofa1st.description: A seemingly weak skill with the sole ability to pass itself on..
stellarprism.skill.asta.description: Harness the power of the devil in the 5 leaf grimoire and show them your magic is Never Giving Up!
stellarprism.skill.mode.asta.surpass: Surpass Your Limits. Right Here. Right Now
stellarprism.skill.blackform.form: My Magic Is Never Giving Up
stellarprism.skill.blackform.return: The Anti Magic Returns Into The Grimoire...
Ignore weak corruption damage or resist the damage of powerful attacks.
setllarprism.skill.eldritch_resitance.de: Ignore weak eldritch damage or resist the damage of powerful attacks.
Ignore weak primordial damage or resist the damage of powerful attacks.
stellarprism.skill.heavenlylight.descrip: You have been chosen by the §6light god§r to be the bearer of the heavenly §6light§r that §6shines§r upon all others
stellarprism.skill.copy.successlight: The Unique Skill %s has been assimilated with you
stellarprism.skill.copy.faillight: You have lost a chance to assimilate a skill however your chances grow
stellarprism.skill.copy.faillightperm: You have used all your chances to gain a skill
stellarprism.skill.playfulmajin.descript: So, do you want to be candy, cookie, or pudding when §dBuu§r eats you?
stellarprism.skill.buu_upgrade: The evil defeats the good releasing the original true form of a majin
stellarprism.skill.chaoticmajin.descript: The power of a long ago sealed Majin of destruction now harnessed in a form to make as your own
stellarprism.skill.buu.sleep: You Rest to restore and buff your power
stellarprism.skill.buu.sleepover: You have rested and your power is increased
stellarprism.skill.buu.sleepblock: You Feel Restless and can not sleep for a while
stellarprism.skill.life_reaver.descripti: Reap the §4life§r from your enemies, and grow stronger from taking their Power
stellarprism.life_reaver.passive: This skill has no modes its all passives
stellarprism.skill.life_upgrade: %1$s and %2$s have been Consumed into the skill %3$s
stellarprism.skill.life_consumer.descrip: Consume enemies powers and sacrifice your own in terms of gaining greater strength
stellarprism.life_consumer.max: You cannot sacrifice anymore of your energy
stellarprism.skill.life_conlife_ritualsu: Sacrifice your powers for the aim of a greater one
stellarprism.skill.dirge.description: If you listen closely, you’ll hear yourself speak in someone else’s voice.
stellarprism.skill.mode.dirge.you: I Want to Become Just Like You
stellarprism.skill.mode.dirge.cancel: §6You let the moment slip away, and time ticks on.
stellarprism.skill.mode.dirge.restore: §6The hands of fate turn backward… You return to when the gears first aligned.
stellarprism.skill.mode.dirge.create: §6You wind the clock and mark this moment in time.
stellarprism.skill.mode.dirge.death: §6As death claims you, the watch clicks—time rewinds itself once more.
stellarprism.skill.prism.description: You have gained the power to split §fradiance§r, itself... The applications are limitless, so how shall you wield it?
stellarprism.skill.corruption_drive.desc: §5The hidden gem within your corrupted heart grows with your desires granting you a tougher form
stellarprism.skill.corruption_drive.boos: §5The drive within your heart trembles with your desires
stellarprism.skill.star_power.descriptio: §7After being chosen by the star itself due to your intense will power. You can awaken its true form as it bestows upon your its Star Power to smite any foe who stands against you
stellarprism.skill.star_power.not: §7Your will is not great enough to step into this divine state
stellarprism.skill.shinning_goddess.desc: §eThrough overcoming sheer adversity and intense training you have undergone a super ultimate evolution and now are like a shining goddess. Reflect any attack thrown at your golden aura
stellarprism.skill.shinning_goddess.not: You lack the energy needed for your super ultimate power
stellarprism.skill.crimson_armor.descrip: Bend §4Reality§r and alter your corruption returning it too its roots of a §4demonic§r power
stellarprism.skill.req.off: Your armor has returned within you due to wearing another
stellarprism.skill.crimson_armor.not_cri: Your body cannot harness crimson power
stellarprism.skill.black_crimson_armor.d: Enter your ultimate evolution and transcend §4demonic§r power and crimson power for a black coated armor
stellarprism.skill.corruption_lord_armor: §dThrough representing one of the seven §5sins§d your corruption has undergone a awakening into a Corruption §5Lord
stellarprism.skill.corruption_lord.not_l: §dYour body cannot harness the power of your §5Sin
stellarprism.skill.true_corruption_lord_: §5Through representing all of the seven §5sins§d your corruption has undergone a awakening into a True Corruption Lord
stellarprism.skill.corruption_lord.not_t: §5Your body cannot harness the power of your Sins
stellarprism.skill.corruption_armor.desc: §dAwaken corruption power within you to forge a armor of your own might
stellarprism.skill.black_corruption_armo: §dEnter your ultimate evolution and transcend corruption power for a black coated armor
stellarprism.skill.full_corruption_armor: §dUnleash a completed corruption armor granting a much more completed defense
stellarprism.skill.black_rose_armor.desc: §5Evolving into a beautiful Black Rose allows you to awaken a armor fitting for such a rose
stellarprism.skill.rose_armor.not_corrup: You are not a slime forged within corruption thus this power will not respond to you
stellarprism.skill.ultimate_empress.desc: §dBecome the ultimate empress you were always meant to become and make all who come before you bow before your might
stellarprism.skill.bio_slime.not_bio: §aYou are not a bio engineered slime thus this power does not belong to you
stellarprism.skill.super_slime.descripti: §bThrough being given a power from a amulet you can awaken its power for yourself
stellarprism.skill.bio_slime.super: §bYour body cannot harness the amulets power
stellarprism.skill.godly_super_slime.des: §aThrough awakening a power deep within yourself you are able to awaken a power that feels almost godly
stellarprism.skill.bio_slime.godly_super: §aYour body cannot bring out your evolved power
stellarprism.skill.godly_super_slime_ult: §2Through pouring your sorrows and hatred you have forced yourself to evolve into a incomplete evolution, but one that gets the job done regardless of who must die..
stellarprism.skill.bio_slime.godly_super: §2You dont feel enough §4bloodlust§2 to bother with this power
§aThrough mastering your own powers you have undergone a §2Ultimate§a evolution. Now nothing can take you down!
stellarprism.skill.bio_slime.super_slime: §aYour body doesn't have the energy to weild your §2ultimate§a form
